COURT TRIAL

MASTER CALENDAR COURT

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Diana Padilla. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority and there being no appearance by Defendant, Roy Williams, the matter is ordered off settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
